title: habenella petalodes
side_effects: Habenella petalodes can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing severe allergic reactions, nausea, and dizziness in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to its extracts can lead to kidney damage and respiratory issues in sensitive persons. In extreme cases, improper use of the plant may trigger convulsions, paralysis, or even death. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before utilizing any part of the habenella petalodes plant for medicinal purposes.
